Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 54 

OUD_ANY_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Overarching OUD Disorder (Any of the Three Sub-Indicators) — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the Overarching Opioid Use Disorder (OUD) indicator, which identifies whether a 
beneficiary met any of the three opioid-related sub-Indicators as of the end of the calendar year.
